name: Snapshot Report
description: Document model for creating snapshot reports that track fund flows through categorized accounts over a specified accounting period

global.schema:
type SnapshotReportState {
  ownerIds: [PHID!]!
  accountsDocumentId: PHID
  startDate: DateTime
  endDate: DateTime
  reportName: String
  reportPeriodStart: DateTime
  reportPeriodEnd: DateTime
  snapshotAccounts: [SnapshotAccount!]!
}

type SnapshotAccount {
  id: OID!
  accountId: OID!
  accountAddress: String!
  accountName: String!
  type: AccountType!
  accountTransactionsId: PHID
  startingBalances: [TokenBalance!]!
  endingBalances: [TokenBalance!]!
  transactions: [SnapshotTransaction!]!
}

type TokenBalance {
  id: OID!
  token: Currency!
  amount: Amount_Currency!
}

type SnapshotTransaction {
  id: OID!
  transactionId: String!
  counterParty: EthereumAddress
  amount: Amount_Currency!
  datetime: DateTime!
  txHash: String!
  token: Currency!
  blockNumber: Int
  direction: TransactionDirection!
  flowType: TransactionFlowType
  counterPartyAccountId: OID
}

enum AccountType {
  Source
  Internal
  Destination
  External
}

enum AccountTypeInput {
  Source
  Internal
  Destination
  External
}

enum TransactionDirection {
  INFLOW
  OUTFLOW
}

enum TransactionDirectionInput {
  INFLOW
  OUTFLOW
}

enum TransactionFlowType {
  TopUp
  Return
  Internal
  External
  Swap
}

enum TransactionFlowTypeInput {
  TopUp
  Return
  Internal
  External
  Swap
}
global.initialValue: {"ownerIds": [], "accountsDocumentId": null, "startDate": null, "endDate": null, "reportName": null, "reportPeriodStart": null, "reportPeriodEnd": null, "snapshotAccounts": []}

modules.name: configuration
modules.description: Operations for configuring the snapshot report

operations.name: SET_REPORT_CONFIG
operations.description: Set the report configuration including name, period, and accounts document reference
operations.template: Set the report configuration including name, period, and accounts document reference

operations.name: SET_ACCOUNTS_DOCUMENT
operations.description: Link the snapshot report to an Accounts document
operations.template: Link the snapshot report to an Accounts document

operations.name: SET_PERIOD
operations.description: Set the accounting period for the snapshot report
operations.template: Set the accounting period for the snapshot report

operations.name: ADD_OWNER_ID
operations.description: Add an owner ID (builder team) to the snapshot report
operations.template: Set the owner ID (builder team) for the snapshot report

operations.name: REMOVE_OWNER_ID
operations.description: Remove an owner ID from the snapshot report

operations.name: ADD_SNAPSHOT_ACCOUNT
operations.description: Add an account to the snapshot report
operations.schema:
input AddSnapshotAccountInput {
  id: OID!
  accountId: OID!
  accountAddress: String!
  accountName: String!
  type: AccountTypeInput!
  accountTransactionsId: PHID
}
operations.template: Add an account to the snapshot report

errors.name: DuplicateAccountError
errors.description: An account with this ID already exists in the snapshot

operations.name: UPDATE_SNAPSHOT_ACCOUNT_TYPE
operations.description: Update the type categorization of a snapshot account
operations.template: Update the type categorization of a snapshot account

errors.name: UpdateAccountTypeNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified account was not found in the snapshot

operations.name: REMOVE_SNAPSHOT_ACCOUNT
operations.description: Remove an account from the snapshot report
operations.template: Remove an account from the snapshot report

errors.name: RemoveAccountNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified account was not found in the snapshot

modules.name: balances
modules.description: Operations for managing account token balances

operations.name: SET_STARTING_BALANCE
operations.description: Set or update a starting balance for a token in a snapshot account
operations.template: Set or update a starting balance for a token in a snapshot account

errors.name: SetStartingBalanceAccountNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified account was not found in the snapshot

operations.name: SET_ENDING_BALANCE
operations.description: Set or update an ending balance for a token in a snapshot account
operations.template: Set or update an ending balance for a token in a snapshot account

errors.name: SetEndingBalanceAccountNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified account was not found in the snapshot

operations.name: REMOVE_STARTING_BALANCE
operations.description: Remove a starting balance entry from a snapshot account
operations.template: Remove a starting balance entry from a snapshot account

errors.name: RemoveStartingBalanceNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified balance was not found

operations.name: REMOVE_ENDING_BALANCE
operations.description: Remove an ending balance entry from a snapshot account
operations.template: Remove an ending balance entry from a snapshot account

errors.name: RemoveEndingBalanceNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified balance was not found

operations.name: ADD_TRANSACTION
operations.description: Add a transaction to the snapshot with enrichment data
operations.schema:
input AddTransactionInput {
  accountId: OID!
  id: OID!
  transactionId: String!
  counterParty: EthereumAddress
  amount: Amount_Currency!
  datetime: DateTime!
  txHash: String!
  token: Currency!
  blockNumber: Int
  direction: TransactionDirectionInput!
  flowType: TransactionFlowTypeInput
  counterPartyAccountId: OID
}
operations.template: Add a transaction to the snapshot with enrichment data

errors.name: DuplicateTransactionError
errors.description: A transaction with this ID already exists in the snapshot

errors.name: AddTransactionAccountNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified account was not found in the snapshot

operations.name: REMOVE_TRANSACTION
operations.description: Remove a transaction from the snapshot
operations.template: Remove a transaction from the snapshot

errors.name: RemoveTransactionNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified transaction was not found

operations.name: UPDATE_TRANSACTION_FLOW_TYPE
operations.description: Update the flow type categorization of a transaction
operations.template: Update the flow type categorization of a transaction

errors.name: UpdateFlowTypeTransactionNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified transaction was not found

operations.name: RECALCULATE_FLOW_TYPES
operations.description: Recalculate all transaction flow types based on current account types and counter-party relationships
operations.template: Recalculate all transaction flow types based on current account types
